channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Iran may ‘give assurances on the use of nuclear facilities’
item.description: Iran may negotiate on nuclear facilities, but it 'won't destroy uranium or allow it to be moved'

item.title: Trump says US will not allow Iran to reach enriched uranium
item.description: US president says Washington has the nuclear material in Iran 'surveilled' and will 'blow up' anyone who gets near it.

item.title: Food inflation hammers households in war-hit Iran
item.description: Iranians faced with skyrocketing food prices as inflation soars, currency plunges amid US-enforced naval blockade.

item.title: LIVE: Barcelona vs Real Madrid – El Clasico La Liga
item.description: Follow the build-up, analysis and live text commentary of a crucial Clasico as Barcelona need a point to win La Liga.

item.title: Russia kills three Ukrainians in 24 hours, accuses Kyiv of violating truce
item.description: Russia claims Ukraine has committed more than 1,000 violations since the three-day truce came into effect on Saturday.

item.title: Putin hints at ending Russia’s war in Ukraine, but why now?
item.description: Amid a US-backed ceasefire, Putin signals peace talks could progress, but broader negotiations remain stalled.

item.title: With food benefit cuts looming in the US, Californians eye billionaire tax
item.description: US gov't cuts to food stamps will hit thousands of Californians. The state is set to vote on billionaire tax to make up.

item.title: Iran sends response to US ceasefire proposal via Pakistan
item.description: Tehran has been saying negotiations should focus on ending hostilities, securing guarantees against future attacks.

item.title: Football on ruins: Gaza’s orphans find refuge on the pitch
item.description: A Gaza teenager orphaned by an Israeli attack finds refuge in football amid the decimation of Palestinian sports.

item.title: Stories of those killed in a single day of Israeli strikes on Lebanon
item.description: Israeli strikes have killed at least 39 people in a single day of attacks across Lebanon during a so-called ‘ceasefire.’

item.title: Jorge Martin wins his first Aprilia Grand Prix at French MotoGP
item.description: Ex-MotoGP world champion now only a single point behind Aprilia teammate Marco Bezzecchi in the riders' standings.

item.title: ‘Ukraine has momentum in war with Russia’
item.description: ‘Ukraine has momentum in war with Russia’

item.title: Passengers from Hantavirus-hit cruise begin disembarking ship
item.description: Passengers from the MV Hondius, the cruise ship at the centre of a Hantavirus outbreak, have begun disembarking.

item.title: Can Asian economies cope with the fallout from the Iran war?
item.description: Fuel costs, inflation and debt pressures are testing Asian economies.

item.title: Atef Najib faces at least 10 charges in landmark Syria trial
item.description: Cousin of former President Bashar al-Assad faces charges that include murder, torture and responsibility for massacres.

item.title: Iran sends response to US proposal to end war via mediator Pakistan
item.description: According to the proposal, initial negotiations will focus on ending hostilities.

item.title: Can central banks curb inflation as energy costs rise?
item.description: Central banks hold rates steady as energy shock tests inflation fight.

item.title: US-Iran ceasefire under strain as Gulf states report drone attacks
item.description: Drone hits cargo ship off Qatar’s coast, while Kuwait and the United Arab Emirates repel attacks.

item.title: Why is being a mother so expensive in the United States?
item.description: On Mother’s Day, Al Jazeera details the high cost of motherhood in the US compared with the rest of the world.

item.title: The genocide is still taking Gaza’s mothers
item.description: It now wants to take mine.

item.title: How did Gaza’s sea become a wall?
item.description: For 18 years, Israel has enforced a naval blockade around the Gaza Strip.

item.title: El Clasico: Kylian Mbappe not in Real Madrid squad to face Barcelona
item.description: French forward to miss the crucial fixture despite training with teammates on Friday following his recovery from injury.

item.title: Why is Iran taking time to respond to the US proposal to end the war?
item.description: Iran continues to review the proposal as Tehran's nuclear programme and Strait of Hormuz remain main sticking points.

item.title: Iran military warns of ‘surprising’ methods of warfare if attacked again
item.description: Iran’s army spokesman says if the ‘enemy’ were to attack again, they would face new methods of warfare.

item.title: Libya’s Zawiya refinery resumes full operations
item.description: Refinery closed for about two days after fighting near the facility 40km west of Tripoli.
